name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - Certificate Has Non-DNS Subject Alternative Name
notes: This rule triggers when an X509 certificate has been observed with a subject alternative name that is not a DNS entry. This may be considered a suspicious connection.
conditions_text: when any of Suspect Content Descriptions match certificate has non-DNS subject alternative name
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - Certificate Has Non-DNS Subject Alternative Name on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of Suspect Content Descriptions match certificate has non-DNS subject alternative name
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - Certificate Has Non-DNS Subject Alternative Name
Event description: Detects when an X509 certificate has been observed with a subject alternative name that is not a DNS entry.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
